summary: The change makes `swarm manager next` return an actionable `plan-tasks` state for empty objectives, but it only adds unit coverage in `runtime/swarm.rs`. There is no matching scenario-level/native CLI verification for this new manager-control behavior, so the task does not meet the repo requirement for user-visible runtime/workflow surface changes.
findings: Missing scenario-level coverage for the new empty-objective manager flow. The diff only changes `runtime/swarm.rs`, adding unit tests around `manager_next_json` and text rendering, but no end-to-end/native CLI scenario was added or updated in the scenario suites (for example `scripts/test-native-claspc.sh`). Because this changes live swarm control-plane behavior (`claspc swarm manager next` now emits `status: empty`, `action: plan-tasks`, and a new suggested command), AGENTS.md requires scenario-level verification for this surface.
tests_run: Inspected existing scenario coverage in `scripts/test-native-claspc.sh` around `swarm manager next`; it covers recovery, verifier, approval, mergegate, and objective-complete flows, but not the new empty-objective `plan-tasks` path.
follow_up: Add an end-to-end/native CLI scenario that creates an objective with no tasks and verifies both JSON and text output for `claspc swarm manager next <state-root> <objective-id>` include the new `empty` / `plan-tasks` behavior and suggested task-creation command.
After that lands, rerun the narrow scenario plus `bash scripts/verify-all.sh` before returning pass.
